overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring an industrial warehouse district with beige and brown concrete buildings, power line towers, and open paved lots under a clear blue sky. The character walks across dirt fields and paved surfaces, making several turns through the sparse industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with dirt ground and warehouse buildings

events.description: character approaches paved road and transitions from dirt field to asphalt surface

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the dirt field toward the beige warehouse buildings in the distance

entered.detail: long single-story industrial building with multiple garage doors and beige concrete walls
warehouse building with triangular gable roof visible in the distance
brown dirt and dry grass covering the industrial yard
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide open dirt field toward industrial warehouse buildings under a clear blue sky. The beige warehouse complex with multiple garage doors dominates the left side while a gable-roofed building sits ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved industrial road with high voltage power lines

events.description: character turns left onto the paved road between warehouse buildings
large metal power line tower becomes prominent on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the paved road and walking past the tall power line tower structure

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower with multiple high voltage lines running across
asphalt paved road with visible cracks and patches
large brown industrial building with flat roof ahead

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from dirt to asphalt, turning left onto a paved industrial road. A massive power line tower rises on the left while a brown warehouse building comes into view ahead. The previous beige warehouse complex falls behind on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open paved lot between brown and beige warehouse buildings

events.description: character turns right to walk along the side of the brown warehouse building
sun position creates lens flare as character approaches the building corner

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the paved lot with the brown warehouse wall on the left side

entered.detail: low beige industrial building with open loading dock door visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Turning right, the character walks past the brown warehouse building which now dominates the left side. The power line tower shifts to the right background as the character moves through the open paved lot toward a beige building with a loading dock ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching warehouse loading dock with open garage door

events.description: character turns left toward the beige building with the open loading dock

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the warehouse building with an open loading dock entrance

entered.detail: low industrial buildings visible in the far distance across the lot

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and approaches the beige warehouse building with an open loading dock. The brown warehouse recedes behind as the character moves toward the building entrance, with sun glare becoming visible as the camera faces the sun direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sparse industrial district, transitioning from an open dirt field into a network of paved roads and warehouse loading docks. It begins with the character walking across a wide dirt expanse toward a beige warehouse complex and a distant gable-roofed building under a clear blue sky. As the terrain shifts from dirt to asphalt, the camera turns left onto a paved road, passing a massive power line tower while a brown warehouse comes into view ahead. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, moving past the brown warehouse toward an open paved lot and a beige building with a loading dock. Finally, the camera turns left to approach the building entrance, with the brown warehouse receding behind as sun glare intensifies in the frame.
